analysis.reasoning: Core message: Wang Yi asserts that reunification of the two sides of the Taiwan Strait is inevitable, framed as the trend of history and the collective will of the Chinese nation. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not referenced; no mention of the West or hostility. CH2 (China as benevolent power): No emphasis on international cooperation, law, or global benefits; claim is about national reunification, not benevolence. CH3 (China has an epic history): While it invokes "trend of history" and collective national will, it does not recount historical adversity or resilience; it’s a forward-looking inevitability claim without epic-historical framing. CH4 (appropriate political system and honorable values): Implicit affirmation of national will, but no explicit defense of China’s political system, governance model, or domestic values; focus is on sovereignty/unification. CH5 (CCP succeeds): No mention of governance achievements, development, or minority coexistence. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not applicable. Conclusion: The tweet promotes no listed narrative explicitly or sufficiently.
